mechanism_narrative: Positive trailing growth in RSAFS signals resilient household demand and stronger near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the series trend is rising.
evidence_refs: fact:2019-10 RSAFS vintage value was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher trailing 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than lower RSAFS growth in walk-forward tests, or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in FEDFUNDS indicates monetary easing that lowers equity discount rates and supports risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS falls at least 0.25pp over 3 months or crosses below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered easing episodes produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate, or if mean triggered returns are not higher than non-triggered returns at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in UNRATE signals weakening labor income and rising recession risk, which reduces expected earnings growth and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns following UNRATE rises greater than 0.3pp are positive in more than 60% of triggered observations or are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: A contractionary crossing in INDPRO signals falling manufacturing output and weaker cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:2019-10 INDPRO vintage value was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers are followed by non-negative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if the downside hit rate is not higher than unconditional negative-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is accelerating while FEDFUNDS is rising, investors face both margin pressure and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month inflation rate rises while FEDFUNDS increases at least 0.25pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL acceleration and FEDFUNDS tightening condition does not underperform either single-series condition, or if triggered 20-day returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rebound in HOUST signals improving residential investment and credit-sensitive demand, raising forward earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average and is up more than 5% over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:2019-09 HOUST vintage value was available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST rebound triggers fail to generate higher average 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if the triggered positive-return rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth slows sharply while UNRATE remains low, the economy is in a late-cycle transition from tight labor markets to weaker hiring, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly gain falls below 100000 while UNRATE is below 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:2019-10 PAYEMS and UNRATE vintages were available at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if this joint PAYEMS slowdown and low-UNRATE condition does not predict lower 60-day returns than periods with low UNRATE alone, or if triggered mean returns are positive.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent acceleration in GDPC1 and INDPRO signals broad real activity momentum that lifts expected corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after new data are absorbed.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly growth is positive and INDPRO 3-month percent change crosses above 0%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1 and INDPRO acceleration trigger does not produce higher 5-day S&P 500 returns than either proxy alone, or if triggered average returns are below zero.
